the_wavetable_set: Moving through the tables, moving through the skin / Finding where the sounds of the void begin
Scanning the position, scanning the soul / Finding the fragments, taking the control
Two-fifty-six levels of the digital light / Scanning the shadows of the Phrygian night
the_evolution_set: Change the shape, change the breath / Creating the life from the digital death
Warping the signal, warping the time / Everything's perfect, everything's mine
Spectral evolution, zero to one / The scanning of the binary sun
the_scanning_dialogue: Dive into the wave / Find what I hid
What you crave / Is what I did

psychoacoustic_scanning_v4.the_morphing_effect: Low-pass filter opening as the Wavetable_Position moves to 'Bright' regions
psychoacoustic_scanning_v4.positional_panning: Shifting the stereo-center L/R by ±10% based on Table_Index
psychoacoustic_scanning_v4.vocal_wavetable_sync: Using the 'Monster_7' vocal-wavetable for harmonic consistency
